title: Yoshi
description: goofy mod that adds 3 yoshi abilities
body: Mod made by InklingYoshi584 and for Theropoda Yoshisaur Muchakoopa(InklingYoshi584) This is intended for use in :3 SMP for lore reasons, but you can download it if you want to mess around and have fun. ## Features You need to use `/yoshi player true` to enable abilities ### Abilities: - Gulp: Activates on keybind press, deals 6 armor-piercing damage. 2 second Cooldown. If target is killed by the gulp, drops a Yoshi egg. When thrown, deals 8 damage on impact. - Flutter jump. Can be used infinitely - Ground pound: drops the user down upon keybind press and when user is in air. Deals damage upon landing depending on fall height in range depending on fall height. ### Items: - Music discs: Music from the Yoshi series and remixes! Craftable with an iron ingot and yoshi eggs (Opening Melody(Yoshi's Island), Flower Garden, Fluffy Snow, Here We Go!, Title Theme(Yoshi's Crafted World) Belong to Nintendo, Athletic Theme(Remix) belong to [Qumu](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jigKJ8p15z8) ## Dependencies This mod depends on [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
